mapper.select:
SELECT AD.HO_NO, AD.FLOOR, AD.HO_TY_NO, AD.HO_STTS_CD, AD.HO,
RL.RENT_TYPE_CD, RL.RCRT_LSTG_STTS_CD, RL.MVIN_PSBL_DT, RL.DEAL_STTS_CD, RL.DPST_AMT, RL.MTHLY_RENT_AMT
FROM APT_DETAIL AD JOIN APT_UNIT D ON AD.DONG_NO = D.DONG_NO
LEFT JOIN RENT_LISTING RL ON AD.HO_NO = RL.HO_NO AND RL.DEAL_STTS_CD = 'AVL'
WHERE D.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND D.DONG_NM = #{dongNm}
ORDER BY FLOOR DESC, TO_NUMBER(AD.HO)
SELECT RENT_LSTG_NO FROM RENT_LISTING WHERE HO_NO = #{hoNo} AND DEAL_STTS_CD = 'AVL'
SELECT MVOUT_DT FROM RENT_CTRT WHERE RENT_LSTG_NO IN (SELECT RENT_LSTG_NO FROM RENT_LISTING WHERE HO_NO = #{hoNo}) AND MVOUT_CMPL_DT IS NULL
